title: MonitorThresholds
description: Alert threshold values for metric and service check monitors

critical.description: The threshold value that triggers a CRITICAL alert notification

critical_recovery.description: The threshold value at which a CRITICAL alert recovers to OK state

warning.description: The threshold value that triggers a WARNING alert notification

warning_recovery.description: The threshold value at which a WARNING alert recovers to OK state

ok.description: The threshold for service check monitors indicating an OK state (used with service check monitors)

unknown.description: The threshold for service check monitors indicating an UNKNOWN state
